title: Senior Teacher - VIT University - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - VIT University - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!
